# Distilled Chaos

## Effect

- Play the top 3 cards of your Draw Pile.

---

## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Source facts live above the divider. -->
- Strong when draw-pile order is known or prepared with Headbutt/Gambling Chip-adjacent planning; risky with expensive skills, powers, curses, or off-turn block on top.
